summary: Iteration 26 - Full backend + frontend testing of new Branch Management module (/api/v3/branch-mgmt/*) and BranchManagementBoard UI. Backend: 17/17 pytest passing - GET list returns enriched (leads_total/leads_open/leads_completed/appointments_count/doctors_count) for super_admin and is 403 for pre_sales, POST /with-existing-admin happy path returns branch + updates user.branch_id (verified via GET /hr/users), 404 for missing user, 400 for role mismatch (pre_sales user), 409 when admin already assigned, 403 for pre_sales and branch_admin tokens. PATCH /{id}/admin reassign: unlinks previous admin (sets branch_id=None) and links new (verified), 404 on bad branch, 400 on role mismatch, 403 for pre_sales. GET /{id}/performance returns branch+kpis(11 fields)+stage_breakdown[], math sanity check passes (total_revenue == consultation_fees + package_revenue, conversion = completed/total*100), 404 on bad id. GET /performance-summary returns 1 row per branch with branch_id/branch_name/admin_name/address/leads_total/leads_completed/conversion_rate/total_revenue. Frontend: super_admin login -> 6 top nav tabs (Master/Marketing/Pre-Sales/Pipeline Stages/HR Admin/Branch Management). Clicking 'super-admin-tab-branches' renders BranchManagementBoard with 2 sub-tabs. Creation tab: 4 KPI cards (Total Branches=4 / Available Managers=0 / Active Leads=23 / Total Doctors=26), Add Branch button, 4 existing branch cards each with Branch Admin block + 4 stat tiles + Reassign Manager link + edit/delete icons. Add Branch dialog opens with name/address/admin-dropdown (filtered to un-assigned branch_admin users; correctly empty since seeded branchadmin@fitsiomax.com is already assigned)/phone/vertical fields. Edit dialog (pencil icon) correctly omits admin dropdown (verified). Reassign dialog opens with 2 options (current admin + 1 free candidate). Performance tab: 4 KPI cards + 4-row table with View links + detail dialog showing 10 stat tiles + stage_breakdown horizontal bars. Regression nav across all 6 top tabs OK.

issues: Pre-existing hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' still emitted in console on login (carry-over from iterations 21-25, not from Branch Management module). Located in CRMPage line ~822.

action_items: (Carry-over from iter25/24/23) Remove the <span> wrapper inside <option> in CRMPage Branch Booking <select> to eliminate the hydration warning. Not blocking Branch Management.

(Minor) Confirm-via-window.confirm() on branch delete inside BranchManagementBoard.jsx is inconsistent with the rest of the app's shadcn/sonner dialog UX. Consider replacing with a confirm dialog component.

(Minor) When no candidates exist in Add Branch -> admin dropdown, the UI shows a single disabled <option>'No available branch_admin users - create one in HR'. Consider adding a quick link or button to navigate to HR -> Roles & Credentials directly from this empty state to reduce friction.
critical_code_review_comments: v3_branch_mgmt.list_branches_full runs N+5 sequential count_documents calls per branch (leads_total, leads_open, leads_completed, appointments_count, doctors_count). With 100 branches that is 500 round-trips. Replace with a single $group/$facet aggregation grouped by branch_id, or fan out with asyncio.gather. Same N+1 pattern exists in performance_summary (one aggregate per branch).

v3_branch_mgmt POST /with-existing-admin sets user.branch_id but does NOT update the inverse if that same user previously had branch_id pointing somewhere else. The 409 'already assigned' check uses the branches collection only - if user.branch_id was set manually (e.g. via HR) but no branch row exists referencing them, the create will silently overwrite that branch_id. Consider also rejecting if user.branch_id is non-null and no matching branch (data-integrity).

v3_branch_mgmt.reassign_branch_admin sets previous admin's branch_id to None unconditionally; if multiple branches happen to point to the same user (data corruption from older bugs), the prev user's branch_id will get nulled prematurely. Defensive fix: only set to None when the only branch pointing to them is this one.

branch detail performance treats `leads_completed` as count of leads with stage == 'Completed'. The v3 pipeline has a 'Completed' stage on initial seed, but stages are user-editable via Pipeline Stages module. If a super_admin renames 'Completed' or deletes it, all branches drop to 0% conversion permanently. Consider tagging stages with a kind/system flag (terminal=true) rather than matching on label.
BranchManagementBoard.jsx uses `window.confirm` for delete branch (line 60). Project convention is shadcn/sonner toast + dialog. Minor UX inconsistency.

BranchManagementBoard.jsx PerformanceTab divides s.count / detail.kpis.leads_total inside the stage_breakdown bars without guarding against leads_total=0 - the ?? 0 fallback prevents NaN but if leads_total is 0 the bars all render as 0% which is correct; verified OK.

Reassign flow: ReassignAdminDialog includes the current admin as a re-selectable option. Clicking Save with the same admin pre-selected calls PATCH which is a no-op on the user side but still runs prev_admin_id == payload.admin_user_id branch (skips the unlink) - benign but worth a guard to short-circuit before the DB write.
Pydantic BranchAssignedCreate accepts vertical with no whitelist - any string is stored. Recommend Literal['offline_physiotherapy','online_physiotherapy','fitness'].

success_rate.frontend: ~100% - all 4 creation-tab KPIs render, 4 branch cards visible, Add Branch dialog opens with name/address/admin-select/phone/vertical, admin dropdown correctly filtered (empty - no free candidates since seeded BA is assigned), Reassign dialog opens with current+1 options, Edit dialog correctly hides admin dropdown, Performance tab shows 4 KPIs + 4-row table, detail dialog shows 10 stat tiles + stage_breakdown, all 6 nav tabs reachable.

test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md - super_admin admin@fitsiomax.com/admin123, presales@fitsiomax.com/presales123, branchadmin@fitsiomax.com/branch123. Auth endpoint returns 'token' (not 'access_token').
seed_data_creation: Backend test created and removed TEST_BA_*, TEST_BA2_*, TEST_PRE_* users + TEST_Branch_*, TEST_First_*, TEST_Reassign_*, TEST_RA_*, TEST_RF_* branches via fixtures. A few residual TEST_Branch_294620 and TEST_UpdateBranch_c88611 branches from older iterations are still in the DB and visible in the UI (left by prior test runs, not by this iteration).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branch Management module is fully wired. All endpoints live under /api/v3/branch-mgmt: GET (list,enriched), POST /with-existing-admin, PATCH /{id}/admin, GET /{id}/performance, GET /performance-summary. Roles: super_admin only for POST/PATCH; super_admin+business_dev+marketing_head for GETs. Auth login returns key 'token' (not access_token) - bear this in mind in pytest. Frontend testids: branch-mgmt-board, bm-subtabs, bm-subtab-{creation,performance}, bm-kpi-{total,available,leads,doctors}, bm-add-branch-btn, bm-refresh, bm-branch-card-<id>, bm-branch-{edit,delete,reassign}-<id>, bm-branch-form-dialog, bm-form-{name,address,admin,phone,vertical,submit,cancel,close}, bm-reassign-dialog, bm-reassign-{select,submit,cancel}, bm-perf-kpi-{branches,leads,conv,revenue}, bm-perf-table-card, bm-perf-row-<id>, bm-perf-view-<id>, bm-perf-detail-dialog, bm-perf-detail-close. Edit dialog (isEdit branch in BranchFormDialog) explicitly hides the admin-select - admin reassignment is only via the dedicated Reassign dialog (PATCH /admin).
rca_of_the_issue: No new product bug. Backend route registration verified by hitting public URL successfully on all 5 endpoints with correct role gating. Carry-over hydration warning is the same <span> inside <option> in CRMPage Branch Booking <select> - unrelated to Branch Management.
